name: Frankfurter Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups All-meat frankfurter; cut into 1/2-inch slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Mix all ingredients except biscuits.
3. Boil gently for 5 minutes.
4. Spoon about 3/4 cup mixture into each of 8 individual baking dishes.
5. Top each with biscuit.
6. Bake until golden brown (about 20 minutes).
7. Serve immediately.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE + 2 FAT EXCHANGES + 1 MEAT EXCHANGE + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
Source: Recipes for the Diabetic by Billie Little and Penny L. Thorup.
Per serving: 260 calories.
